common.wantToKnow: Want to be the first to know? Stay tuned!

metadata.title: Deviny - Social Network for Fitness
metadata.description: Social network for fitness and healthy lifestyle

auth.tagline: Social network for fitness and healthy lifestyle
auth.heroTitle: Your path to a healthy lifestyle starts here
auth.heroSubtitle: Deviny brings together fitness enthusiasts, trainers, and nutritionists in one platform. Find motivation, support, and professional guidance.
auth.chooseRole: Choose how you want to use the platform

features.programsDesc: Access professional workout and nutrition plans from certified experts
features.communityDesc: Connect with like-minded people who share your goals and support each other
features.challengesDesc: Stay motivated with challenges, earn XP, level up, and unlock achievements
features.expertsDesc: Find certified trainers and nutritionists, buy programs, leave reviews
features.chatDesc: Stay connected with your trainer and community through instant messaging
features.progressDesc: Share your results, see your growth, and inspire others on their journey

user.title: I'm a user
user.description: Find a trainer, track progress, connect with like-minded people

trainer.title: I'm a trainer
trainer.description: Find clients, create training programs, grow your business

nutritionist.title: I'm a nutritionist
nutritionist.description: Find clients, create nutrition programs, grow your business

register.allowedFormats: PDF, JPG, PNG up to 10 MB
register.hasInjuriesQuestion: Do you have any existing injuries?
register.injuryUploadHint: If yes, upload your medical certificate

validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.passwordDigit: Password must contain at least 1 digit
validation.phoneRequired: Phone number is required for trainers
validation.phoneMin: Phone number must contain at least 10 digits
validation.documentRequired: Please upload a qualification verification document
validation.injuryDocumentRequired: Please upload your medical certificate to proceed
validation.documentSize: File size must not exceed 10 MB
validation.serverUnavailable: Server unavailable. Please try again later.

otp.title: Verify your email
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}
otp.errorExpired: Code expired. Please request a new one.
otp.errorUsed: This code has already been used.
otp.errorTooMany: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
otp.errorServer: Server error. Please try again later.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset your password
forgotPassword.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
forgotPassword.newPasswordSubtitle: Choose a strong password for your account
forgotPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.accountNotFound: No account found with this email address

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and app settings
settings.name: Name
settings.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible and all your data will be deleted.

profile.title: Profile
profile.createFirstPost: Create your first post in the feed
profile.achievementsWillAppear: Achievements will appear as you progress
profile.injuriesDescription: Add your injuries or medical constraints so trainers can take them into account
profile.reviewsWillAppear: Reviews will appear when clients review your programs
profile.fillProfileDescription: Add information about yourself so clients can learn about your experience and specialization. A complete profile builds trust and attracts more clients.
profile.fillProfileDescriptionUser: Add a photo, bio, and location so friends can get to know you better.
profile.uploadPhotoOrVideo: Upload a photo or video to share with your followers

toasts.avatarSizeLimit: File size must not exceed 5 MB

programs.title: My Programs
programs.detailedDescriptionPlaceholder: Provide a detailed description that will be shown to users who purchased this program
programs.basicPriceHint: Basic tier — no direct contact with coach. No sales limit.

programs.standardTierHint: Standard tier — includes chat with coach. Sales stop at max spots.
programs.proPricePlaceholder: Leave empty if no pro version
programs.proPriceHint: Optional. Set a pro version price to offer a premium tier of this program.
programs.proTierHint: Pro tier — chat + audio/video calls with coach. Sales stop at max spots.

toasts.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

toasts.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
